_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: Pak activity was inhibited in ΔBB/PID cells, indicating that this suppressor remained effective in vivo
details: Successfully detected Pak activity inhibition in ΔBB/PID tumor lysates, confirming PID remained effective in vivo
